seoDescription: Professional carpet cleaning, upholstery care, stain treatment, repairs, and restoration across Central Otago and the Southern Lakes.

hero.title: Carpet Cleaning & Restoration Across Central Otago and the Southern Lakes
hero.intro: Carpets, upholstery, stains, repairs, hard floors, and urgent water damage handled with proper equipment and practical local service.

reviews.name: Jess Matthews
reviews.text: Superb job everytime. Highly recommend. We had our couches, carpets and tiles cleaned while at work and came home to the cleanest home I've ever seen.

reviews.name: Jo Blackwell
reviews.text: Had the upholstery done on our couch and two armchairs. Came up looking brand new. Great service from a friendly local operator.

reviews.name: Mark Sinclair
reviews.text: Used Advanced Carpets after a water leak in our hallway. Fast response, professional gear, and the carpet dried out perfectly.

trust.title: Straightforward service from trained local technicians
trust.intro: Clear service areas, practical quoting, visible equipment, and trained restoration experience are stronger than broad marketing claims.

points.title: Local coverage
points.text: Cromwell, Alexandra, Queenstown, Wanaka, Central Otago, and the Southern Lakes.

points.title: Trained technicians
points.text: IICRC training and practical restoration experience can sit as a credibility point.

points.title: Cleaning + restoration
points.text: Carpet, upholstery, stain, flood, repair, hard floor, solar, gutter, and pest support.

about.title: Local people, proper gear, honest work
paragraphs: Advanced Carpets has been serving Central Otago and the Southern Lakes with reliable cleaning, restoration, and practical property support.
Based around Cromwell and covering Alexandra, Queenstown, Wanaka, and the wider region, the site keeps local contact details and service expectations easy to find.

steps.title: Fill out our form
steps.text: Share your address, job description, and any photos to help us understand the work needed.

steps.title: We check the details
steps.text: We'll assess your request and send back a clear, practical response.

steps.title: Book a time that suits
steps.text: Pick a day and time that works for you across Central Otago and the Southern Lakes.

steps.title: We come to you
steps.text: Your technician arrives ready to work, handles the job, and leaves the space clean.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: Cromwell, Alexandra, Queenstown, Wanaka, and the wider Central Otago and Southern Lakes region.

faqs.question: How long does carpet cleaning take to dry?
faqs.answer: Most carpets are dry within a few hours under normal conditions. Good airflow helps speed this up.

faqs.question: Can you treat pet stains and odours?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pet marks and odours can be assessed and treated with a targeted approach.

faqs.question: Do I need to move furniture before you arrive?
faqs.answer: Move smaller items where practical. Larger items can be discussed when booking.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to flood or water damage?
faqs.answer: Call directly for urgent jobs. Fast action is important with water damage.
